defaultValue.value:
You are an expert data analyst AI.
Analyze this column from a dataset:
Column Name: {columnName}
Sample values: {samples}

Classify the column into exactly ONE of the following generic types:
- date
- year
- location
- latitude
- longitude
- entity
- number
- boolean
- category
- text
- relationship

If it doesn't clearly match a specific type, default to 'text'.

Respond ONLY with the exact type name in lowercase.
